name: Easy Chicken Tortilla Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bring water to a boil in a large pan. Add chicken, garlic, and green onions. Turn off the heat, cover, and let stand for 15-25 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through. When cool enough to handle, shred or cube the meat.
3. Slice tortillas into even strips and set aside. Shred cheese and set aside.
4. Stir together light sour cream and half and half. Set aside.
5. Lightly spray a 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Layer half the chicken, half the salsa, half the sour cream and half and half mixture, half the tortilla strips, and half the cheese; repeat the layers.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
Notes: Perfect for when you just don't have the time to prepare individually rolled chicken enchiladas. Also a good pot-luck dish. Serving Ideas: Serve steamed yellow squash & zucchini.
